data.title: Cipla Backs IEPFA ‘Saksham Niveshak’ Drive With Shareholder Notices
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cipla Ltd ( (IN:CIPLA) ) has shared an announcement.

Cipla has notified stock exchanges that it has published newspaper advertisements supporting the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority’s Second 100-Day Campaign, ‘Saksham Niveshak’. The campaign targets the company’s shareholders to help them regularize pending dividend claims and complete KYC updates, with details also made available on Cipla’s website, reinforcing its compliance and investor-servicing practices.

By participating in the ‘Saksham Niveshak’ initiative and formally alerting investors through national and regional newspapers, Cipla is aiming to improve shareholder awareness and reduce unclaimed dividends. The move underscores the company’s alignment with regulatory priorities under SEBI’s disclosure norms and may enhance trust and transparency for its investor base.

More about Cipla Ltd

Cipla Ltd is a leading Indian pharmaceutical company headquartered in Mumbai, operating in the global generics and branded medicines market. The company focuses on respiratory, anti-infective, cardiovascular and other therapeutic segments, supplying drugs to both domestic and international markets and maintaining listings in India and Luxembourg.

Average Trading Volume: 91,565

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 990.9B INR

data.title: Fosun’s Yuyuan Posts Strong Q1 Profit Rebound but Cash Flow Turns Negative
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Fosun International ( (HK:0656) ) has issued an announcement.

Fosun International has highlighted the first-quarter 2026 performance of its Shanghai-listed subsidiary Yuyuan, which reported revenue of RMB 9.65 billion, up 9.87% year on year. Net profit attributable to shareholders surged more than threefold to RMB 156.97 million, with core profit excluding non-recurring items swinging from a loss to a profit, indicating a marked improvement in operating performance.

Despite stronger earnings, Yuyuan’s net cash flow from operating activities fell into negative territory at RMB -485.55 million, compared with a positive RMB 317.78 million a year earlier, while total assets and shareholder equity edged down slightly versus year-end 2025. The figures suggest that while profitability is recovering, cash generation and balance-sheet trends will be key areas for investors to monitor in assessing the sustainability of the turnaround.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0656) stock is a Buy with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fosun International stock, see the HK:0656 Stock Forecast page.

More about Fosun International

Fosun International Limited is a diversified investment and holding company with significant operations in China, spanning sectors such as consumer and tourism. Its subsidiary Shanghai Yuyuan Tourist Mart (Group) Co., Ltd., listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange, operates in retail and related consumer businesses, serving domestic Chinese markets through its broad commercial footprint.

Average Trading Volume: 26,006,075

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$33.21B

data.title: Flutter Cancels New Tranche of Shares Under Multi-Billion Buyback Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) has issued an announcement.

Flutter Entertainment plc has redeemed and cancelled 66,869 of its ordinary shares in the U.S. market on April 15 via broker Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, at a volume-weighted average price of $111.49. Following this latest tranche of buybacks, the group will have 174,039,580 ordinary shares in issue, modestly enhancing earnings per share and capital returns for investors.

The transaction is part of Flutter’s ongoing $250 million 10-week buyback launched in March 2026, itself a component of a wider plan to repurchase up to $5 billion of shares announced in 2024. The continued execution of this programme underscores management’s confidence in the company’s valuation and balance sheet strength, while also tightening the free float and potentially supporting the share price over time.

More about Flutter Entertainment PLC

Flutter Entertainment plc is a global sports betting and online gaming group whose brands span online sportsbooks, casino, poker and daily fantasy sports. The company focuses on regulated markets, with a growing presence in the U.S. and other key jurisdictions, and competes as one of the largest operators in the digital gambling industry worldwide.

For an in-depth examination of FLUT stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Kavango Advances Nara Gold Deal and Mulls Operating Company Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Kavango Resources ( (GB:KAV) ).

Kavango Resources has signed a Deed of Variation with the seller of the Nara Gold Project in Zimbabwe, refining the completion mechanics of its previously exercised option to acquire 100% of the 45-claim asset. The company has moved the remaining purchase consideration into escrow and expects completion of the transaction once final documentation is in place.

The parties are also discussing the potential acquisition of Romjack Mining, the operating company at Nara, to enable Kavango to continue operations seamlessly after completion. Management signalled plans to evaluate co-locating its exploration team in Zimbabwe, indicating a strategic push to enhance operational efficiency and deepen its project development presence in the country.

Spark’s Take on KAV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KAV is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—large operating losses and significant cash burn despite only early-stage revenue—partly offset by a balance sheet with positive equity and moderate leverage. Technicals are mixed with neutral momentum and short-term stabilization, while valuation is difficult to support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on KAV stock, click here.

More about Kavango Resources

Kavango Resources is a Southern Africa-focused metals exploration and gold production company listed in London and on the Victoria Falls Stock Exchange. The group is building a portfolio of exploration and mining assets, with a growing emphasis on Zimbabwean gold projects as it seeks to expand its operational footprint in the region.

data.title: Anglo-Eastern Plantations Plans Jakarta IPO for Indonesian Palm Oil Unit
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Anglo Eastern Plantations ( (GB:AEP) ) has shared an announcement.

Anglo-Eastern Plantations plans to list its Indonesian subsidiary PT AEP Nusantara Plantations Tbk on the Indonesia Stock Exchange, positioning the unit that holds around 19,000 hectares of plantations in Central Kalimantan as its main growth platform in the region. The group has also opened a representative office in Jakarta to support its broader Indonesia strategy and investor engagement.

The proposed IPO will involve issuing about 15% new shares to meet public float rules, with proceeds earmarked for capital expenditure including infrastructure development at PT Kahayan Agro Plantation and a new palm oil mill. Completion is targeted by mid-2026 subject to regulatory approvals, a move expected to create a more efficient vehicle for estate expansion and to broaden the company’s investor base in its key operating market.

Spark’s Take on AEP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AEP is a Outperform.

Anglo Eastern Plantations scores well due to its strong financial performance and attractive valuation. The company’s robust balance sheet and effective cash flow management are significant strengths. The ongoing share buyback program further enhances shareholder value. However, the modest revenue growth and neutral technical indicators slightly temper the overall outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on AEP stock, click here.

More about Anglo Eastern Plantations

Anglo-Eastern Plantations (AEP) is a palm oil producer that owns, operates and develops sustainable palm-oil plantations in Indonesia and Malaysia. Through subsidiaries such as PT AEP Nusantara Plantations Tbk and PT Kahayan Agro Plantation, the group manages plantation and processing assets, focusing on expansion in regions like Central Kalimantan to strengthen its presence in the Indonesian palm oil industry.

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Emperor Watch & Jewellery ( (HK:0887) ) has provided an announcement.

Emperor Watch & Jewellery has called its annual general meeting for 18 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will vote on the adoption of the 2025 audited financial statements, the declaration of a final dividend, the re-election of two directors, and the re-appointment of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu as independent auditor. The meeting will also seek shareholder approval to grant the board a general mandate to issue new shares up to 20% of the existing share capital and to buy back up to 10% of its own shares, measures that would give the company greater flexibility in managing its capital structure and potential future funding or share repurchase activities.

More about Emperor Watch & Jewellery

Emperor Watch & Jewellery Limited is a Hong Kong–incorporated retailer specialising in luxury timepieces and fine jewellery. The company targets mid- to high-end consumers, operating primarily in Hong Kong and other key Asian markets where demand for branded watches and jewellery is driven by tourism and affluent local customers.

data.title: Regulator Clears Xie Kai as Chief Information Officer of China Bohai Bank
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

China Bohai Bank Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:9668) ) just unveiled an announcement.

China Bohai Bank announced that China’s National Financial Regulatory Administration has approved the qualification of Xie Kai as the bank’s chief information officer, formalizing an appointment originally disclosed in December 2025. His role became effective on April 13, 2026, and he concurrently serves as a member of the party committee and a vice president of the bank.

The confirmation of Xie Kai’s qualification strengthens the bank’s senior management structure in the critical area of information technology and digital operations, underscoring regulatory confidence in its leadership. This move may support China Bohai Bank’s efforts to enhance its technology governance and digital transformation capabilities, factors that are increasingly important for competitiveness and risk management in China’s banking sector.

More about China Bohai Bank Co., Ltd. Class H

China Bohai Bank Co., Ltd. is a joint stock commercial bank incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 9668. The bank operates within China’s financial services industry, offering a range of banking products and services to corporate and retail clients, with governance overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors.

data.title: FIH Mobile Sets 2026 AGM to Approve Dividend, Board Mandates and Share Issuance Authority
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FIH Mobile ( (HK:2038) ) has shared an update.

FIH Mobile has called its 2026 annual general meeting for 22 May in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review the audited consolidated financial statements for the year to 31 December 2025 and vote on a proposed final dividend of US3.47 cents per share. Investors will also decide on the re-election of three directors, the re-appointment of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu as auditor, and a mandate allowing the board to issue up to 10% of the company’s share capital, excluding treasury shares, which would give management added flexibility for future capital-raising or strategic transactions.

The proposed dividend signals the board’s intent to return cash to shareholders following the 2025 financial year, while the re-election of Philip Huang, Charles Lin and Nadia Chen points to continuity in corporate governance and strategic direction. The share issuance mandate, subject to shareholder approval, would enable FIH Mobile to respond more nimbly to market opportunities or funding needs within prescribed limits under Hong Kong listing rules, potentially affecting future dilution and capital structure for existing shareholders.

More about FIH Mobile

FIH Mobile Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the mobile and electronics manufacturing sector. The company provides design, manufacturing and related services for mobile devices and electronics brands, serving global technology customers and focusing on large-scale, outsourced production and engineering support in competitive consumer and communications markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$15.71B

data.title: Kinergy Grants Performance-Linked Share Options Equal to 0.84% of Capital
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kinergy Corporation Ltd. ( (HK:3302) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kinergy Corporation Ltd. has granted 7,720,000 share options to selected eligible participants under its 2018 share option scheme, representing about 0.84% of its issued share capital. The options carry an exercise price of HK$0.365 per share, equal to the stock’s closing price on the grant date and above recent average trading levels, and will be valid for five years until April 13, 2031.

The options vest after a 12‑month period and are only exercisable if specific performance targets tied to the group’s 2026 financial results and individual KPIs are met, otherwise they will lapse. By tying equity incentives to measurable performance and a one‑year vesting horizon, the company aims to reward past and potential contributions, strengthen retention, and better align management and employee incentives with long-term shareholder interests.

More about Kinergy Corporation Ltd.

Kinergy Corporation Ltd., incorporated in Singapore and listed in Hong Kong, operates as a holding company with its shares traded on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong under stock code 3302. The group focuses on creating shareholder value through corporate development and uses equity-based incentives to align management and employee interests with long-term performance.
